nasb.text: Then they came near to him and said, “We will build here sheepfolds for our livestock and cities for our little ones;

esv.text: Then they came near to him and said, “We will build sheepfolds here for our livestock, and cities for our little ones,

cnv.text: 兩支派的人走到摩西跟前，對他說：“我們要在這裡給我們的牲畜築羊圈，給我們的孩子建城邑。

ccb.text: 他们上前对摩西说：“我们要在这里为牲畜建围栏，为家眷筑城邑，
